title: tanacetum stapfianum
intro: Tanacetum stapfianum, also known as Stapf's tansy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Tanacetum stapfianum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
